title: Human-readable plan title

classification.studio: shay | site-studio | media-studio | component-studio | cross-platform | mission-control | fritz

label: short-runtime-label
non_goals: What this plan will not do.

execution_policy.intervention_threshold: Only stop for destructive side effects, missing credentials, irreversible decisions Fritz must own, or external blockers that tools cannot resolve.
execution_policy.orchestration_mode: multi-swarm parallel orchestration is allowed and preferred when dependencies permit.
execution_policy.swarm_expectation: Break work into orchestrated parallel swarms and sub-swarms when that is the most efficient path.
execution_policy.task_ledger_expectation: Update the task list immediately as each task completes, blocks, or changes state so the plan can resume cleanly after interruption.

goal.why_it_matters: Why the result matters to Fritz/FAMtastic.
proof: Artifact, screenshot, test, or command output that proves the work

truth_surfaces: Capability matrix / AGENTS / CLAUDE surfaces when doctrine changes

workstreams.title: Example workstream
acceptance: What proves this workstream is done
